entry.title: Re: Launch Fiori Launchpad in the "Create a SAP Fiori based Table Maintenance app"
entry.content: I have the same problem as the OP. I understand your directions and I could open the Fiori Launchpad. However, i can't find the Custom Business Configurations app, neither via the search bar nor via the the app finder.

entry.title: Re: EDI PO to SO questions - How to remove segment E1EDKA...
entry.content: Thanks for the quick response!

entry.title: Re: EDI PO to SO questions - How to remove segment E1EDKA...
entry.content: The problem for the material number is that it is the same number for both customer and vendor, which is the reason why it gets qualifier 001. I understand that if the material numbers were different, in this case by entering the material nunber used by the vendor qualifier 002 would be triggered but I also understand that CMIR should be created for this purpose. In my case, both vendor and customer are using the same material numbers (it's the same company sitting in different SAP instances so it's a kind of "intercompany" PO/SO flow. I guess I will need to go ahead with an enhancement in the FM on the sending system or an IDOC conversion rule on the receiving system.

entry.title: Public Cloud and Sales&Service Cloud V2 - Difference between Main Filters and Segment Filters
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

we have integrated SAP Public Cloud with SAP Sales & Services Cloud V2.

Now we ask ourselves what is the difference in data replication between Main Filters and Segment Filters? 

Thanks in advance!

Katharina

entry.title: Re: EDI PO to SO questions - How to remove segment E1EDKA...
entry.content: As for the partner LS, it is also linked with the same flow. Since we are sending the IDOCs via an external system, we defined message ORDERS for LS partner and assigned the output type that I created specifically for purchase orders to trigger the process ME10 in message control tab.

entry.title: Re: Why the expiry date of SF "Certified Professional" in...
entry.content: Hi @Margit_Wagner Margit - I used the same ticket "ID:5000125724" that I created 2 weeks before....THANK YOU so much for your follow up!!!

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @ajay_soreng 

We still haven't received the confirmation email. Could you please confirm when we can expect it?

 

Thanks,

Nandhini Thanikachalam.

entry.title: Re: Restricting the ME21 screen inputs
entry.content:
If creating transaction variants is not enough:

As I would not expect a BAdI in such a report (selection screen), check the Abap source with SE80, better look for implicit/explicit avalibale enhancement spots to add some code like

  • AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON S_EINDT to check the duration (insure select-options not empty adn sum of high minus low lower than limit)
  • call FM SELECT_OPTIONS_RESTRICT to change some selection screen behaviour (in PBO, .AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT

entry.title: Re: SAP Convergent Charging - Setting Up Core Tool User interface
entry.content:
Hi Doris,

Thanks for reaching out.
This message normally appears when your JVM isn't from SAP.
Currently, the check is based upon the version name that's given by the JVM's binary itself.
So, to diagnose that, can you please simply launch the Java runnable file, along with the "-version" flag and, more importantly, using the full path that you've specified in the Core tool script?
Here's what I mean (i.e., <PATH_FROM_SCRIPT>\bin\java -version"):
c:\Users\cc2adm\Downloads\sapmachine-jre-17.0.14_windows-x64_bin.zip\sapmachine-jre-17.0.14\bin\java -version

Can you please confirm that this gives the name of a SapMachine?

Best regards.

François
SAP Convergent Charging Support

entry.title: Re: ITAB to JSON
entry.content: Have a look at AJSON - https://github.com/sbcgua/ajson

entry.title: Re: Hi All, SAC Query related to valid date in currency c...
entry.content:
In SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), the "Valid From" column in the currency conversion table defines the start date from which a currency conversion rate is applicable. The system links this date with the date dimension and transaction data date to apply the
correct conversion rate. When generating planning reports, SAC matches the transaction date with the applicable "Valid From" date range to fetch the relevant rate.

Example:
If a rate is valid from 01-Jan-2018, and the transaction date is 15-Feb-2019, the system will apply this rate.
For a transaction date of 20-Dec-2017, it will skip this rate unless another valid rate exists for that period.

entry.title: Re: How to Reclaim size of volume "/hana/log" when it is full.
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am facing this issue and I run command sapcontrol -nr 00 -function StopSystem and It response me back as sapcontrol is not Typo. What can I do for this?


Best regards,
Tony

entry.title: Re: Periodic Postings in Contract and Lease Management
entry.content:
Hi Daniel,

Thank you for your answer. We have also come to the conclusion that a possibility is to run three separate background jobs. It would however be appreciated if there are any other settings that can be used to make a single run that creates one invoice per month and also affects several periods.

Best regards,

Filip

entry.title: Re: Intercompany STO and sales configuration
entry.content: There should be a link to Customizing note 109254 - Customizing stock transport order Cross Company in the KBA

entry.title: SAP Functional Consultant (MM, PP, FICO, SD, TM or IDP)
entry.content:
SAP Functional Consultant (MM, PP, FICO, SD, TM or IDP)

Intermediate (3 - 5 yrs)

This role

As a Functional Consultant at our client Netherlands, you will play a dual role as both architect and leader. You will focus on developing conceptually strong and efficient, top-quality solutions within the domain of either MM, SD, FICO, PP, TM or IDP. In this role you can keep the bigger picture in mind and make it central to your decision-making. You are not only a subject matter expert but also a leader who stays up-to-date with the latest developments.

You inspire and convince both clients and colleagues about the best way to execute solutions, and you can facilitate the process yourself. By challenging existing solutions, you help elevate the organization to a higher level. You are a driving force that brings people, solutions, and projects together. You also play a key role in presales processes and improvement initiatives. Thanks to your broad knowledge and experience, you can handle multiple projects simultaneously and gain energy from guiding complex initiatives.

Company profile

Our client in the Netherlands is a frontrunner in SAP. Your insights and solutions to complex challenges and creative ideas are invaluable to the team. With your passion, extensive knowledge, and experience, you strive to deliver top-quality services and build long-term relationships.

With 230 colleagues in the Netherlands and 4600 colleagues in 19 other countries, you are guaranteed international exposure.

Through technology, they help their clients increase operational efficiency, implement customer experiences, or deliver valuable business insights. They connect people and businesses, allowing them to focus on what they do best—in the most efficient way. As consultants, they are proud of the solutions they build and the services they offer.

At our client, you’ll have more freedom than the North Sea is deep! Whether you work from home, at the office, or at the client’s location, it doesn’t matter to them, as long as it fits into the planning. They understand that life is dynamic, and as an employer, they are dynamic too. Trust and autonomy are their key principles.

You can be assured of a challenging learning environment with a steep learning curve. They believe that you’re in charge of your career path. They provide the support, but you determine the direction.


Does this sound like something for you? Then we are confident that you will love working at our client!

Function criteria

  • Bachelor's degree or equivalent.
  • As a Functional Consultant, you have extensive experience and are comfortable working independently on end-to-end projects.
  • 3+ years' experience as a SAP Functional Consultant.
  • Preferably a minimum of 2 full cycle SAP implementations concluded is required - in either of the following SAP Modules: MM, SD, FICO, PP, TM or IDP. 
  • SAP Certifications are a bonus. 
  • Blueprint experience is beneficial, but not essential.
  • Customization and configuration experience.
  • You have the ability to independently work on a SAP (MM, SD, FICO, PP, TM or IDP) project from blueprint (or configurations) to go-live, including HyperCare.
  • You are a strong communicator in Afrikaans & English.
  • You can translate business processes into a concrete functional solution.
  • You can take on a lead role to convince others of the chosen solutions.
  • You are a true big-picture thinker and strategist.
  • You enjoy taking things to the next level.
  • You are comfortable playing a crucial role in presales processes and improvement initiatives and are capable of managing multiple projects simultaneously.
  • Your energy and drive help you continuously bring out the best in yourself and others.

You are ready to become one of the team and can identify with our client's core values: Care, Commitment, Entrepreneurship, Respect, and Team Spirit.

Job offer

A challenging full-time position in an informal working environment that is constantly evolving. Society is changing rapidly and we continuously respond to these changes. Standing still is not an option and quality and innovation are high on our agenda. Especially if we want to make an essential contribution to social interests.

In addition, you can count on:

  • A Relocation package
  • Step-by-step assistance with your relocation processes and covered virtual sessions with our relocation experts.
  • Visa application and 30% tax ruling application done by Ir Olav’s Globetrotters on your behalf.
  • A great South African community is waiting for you in the Netherlands.
  • Market-related salary. 8,33% holiday allowance.
  • Dutch Government-authorized pension plan activated once you arrive in the Netherlands.
  • One-on-one Dutch lessons up until company requirement where your partner can join lessons for free.
  • Company laptop.
  • Commitment for an indefinite contract with our client 
  • Mentoring and coaching until you go over the payroll of our client
  • Great on and offline events to meet your fellow Globetrotters and learn about the Netherlands, hosted by Ir Olav's Globetrotters.
  • Pleasant working atmosphere, where you can be and stay yourself.

How to apply

Are you just as excited as us about this role? Great! Then you're sure to be a good match! Applying for a job with us is very easy. Send your CV and motivation, using the application button and one of our recruiters will call you or email us at recruitment@irolav.world

entry.title: Re: Enabling Generative AI in SAP BTP: Integrating AI Core, AI Launchpad, and API Readiness
entry.content:
Hello, nice Blog. Do you have any recommendations regarding a governance concept? Because as far as i saw, there is now parameters or restrictions you can specify on servicekey or instance level - so if anyone gets ai-core-extended credentials, what they need for coding with the GenAI Hub SDK for example, they can administrate the whole Gen AI Hub right? At least via API, the AI Launchpad has Role Collections for this. But with the service key itself it is only possible to have complete admin access right?

BR!

entry.title: Mass change of Master Recipe usage in SAP Public Cloud is it possible?
entry.content: Hi, can someone help me, i need to do a mass change to master recipe, what are my options, since the manage master recipe app doesn't allow mass changes?

entry.title: HTML validation error in User Settings of LMS
entry.content:
Hi,

I’m trying to do some setting changes in User settings page of Learning administration-->application administration.

To enable/disable settings I’m getting Validation error for as “The HTML Text you entered is not supported.” We have custom HTML code used, and it was working fine but to disable one feature now this error is showing up in the user login panel.

I’ve tried multiple ways to change the tags as per few KB’s but couldn’t succeed.  Can anyone please suggest/support here.

entry.title: Re: Generate CAP Project in BAS with Error @sap/hdi-deplo...
entry.content: This only works in BAS. When deploying in CI/DS we still get the same issue (cds-dk@8.9.0 depends on non-existing hdi-deploy@4.5.2)

entry.title: Re: Can you add custom MDFs to Alumni (OBX-31773)
entry.content: @ArjenVHooydonk you can add custom MDFs as part of offboarding. Alumni can access

entry.title: How can i mass change the valuation category of a material? in sap public cloud
entry.content:
I checked and there's no stock, there's no purchase orders, or process orders, and it doens't allow me to change,

 

Can someone help me try to unterstand?

entry.title: Re: How can I access the images in my SmartForms from the...
entry.content:
Hello, all pictures are "saved" in object Attachment which is connected to object ChecklistInstanceElement. I will send my approach from business rule:
1. array "attachment"

SELECT a.id as id, a.type as type FROM ChecklistInstance ci JOIN ChecklistInstanceElement cie ON cie.checklistInstance = ci.id JOIN Attachment a ON a = cie.object WHERE ci.object.objectId = ${activity.id} AND cie.elementId = 'attachment1' AND (a.type = 'JPG' OR a.type='JPEG' OR a.type='PNG')

2. action to GET Attachment

https://eu.fsm.cloud.sap/cloud-attachment-service/api/v1/Attachment/${attachments[i].id}/content?dtos=Attachment.19&account=${account.name}&company=${company.name}

entry.title: Re: EDI PO to SO questions - How to remove segment E1EDKA...
entry.content: You should be able to use the same material number as vendor material number, it will be them populated in E1EDP19 with qualifier 002. You can also create CMIR with the same material numbers. It is a bit more complicated in terms of data maintenance, but in this case you don't need any enhancements.

entry.title: Choose the incorrect information about the exception hierarchy in ABAP.
entry.content:
In this question, I doesn't know the answer? Anyone help me?
(Choose 1 answer)
Choose the incorrect information about the exception hierarchy in ABAP.
A. Every exception class offers a range of standard methods and attributes are derived from the subclass CX_ROOT.
B. All exception classes must be derived from one of the classes CX_STATIC_CHECK,CX_DYNAMIC_CHECK or CX_NO_CHECK.
C. The classes CX_STATIC_CHECK, CX_DYNAMIC_CHECK, CX_NO_CHECK are subclasses of superclass CX_ROOT.
D. None of the others.

entry.title: CMS components extending SimpleCMSComponent are showing as hidden/blocked in smart edit
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

For one of our projects, we are facing one issue with SmartEdit as follows: 

  • CMS components extending SimpleCMSComponent are showing as hidden/blocked in smart edit.
    • These components are not appearing in page preview in smart edit
    • Some of the components are appearing as hidden
  • There is no restriction getting applied – we have already verified it.
  • Visibility/display Boolean flag is also TRUE for these
  • We tried to unblock SimpleCMSComponent with spring xml as suggested by SAP – but solution did not work
  • Where as when we add or edit these components to page with Backoffice these are getting saved & appearing on Ui without any issues.

Main affected components:

  • Button component
  • Sub category component
  • Big category component

All of these are extending SimpleCMSComponent.

Kindly let me know, if anyone has any suggestions.
--

Thanks & Regards,
Harish Vatsa

entry.title: Log changes in Qunats
entry.content:
Hello together,

As I saw there is no change log for quants (LS22)

I have the need to log changes to quants. More precise who and when a removal/putaway block is set or deleted. 

Sadly I could not found any user exits where I can create such a logging with a Z table. 

Is there anything possible in ECC EHP8?

Best regards

Marcel

entry.title: Re: EDI PO to SO questions - How to remove segment E1EDKA...
entry.content: Regarding E1EDKA1 segment, it is a bit difficult to answer without checking your system settings. If I understand correctly, you have the partner function LS in the PO header?

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Hi @zoheb1 please reach out to support to find out what happened in your case and help you.

Kind Regards, Suzanne

entry.title: Couldn't connect to mockserver from app in the same pod via local host ?
entry.content:
Hi,

Mock server is used here as part of the automation test for the application. The application is deployed in BTP pods. The application and the mock server runs on the same pod. When accessing the mock server from the application via localhost it throws the below error. Can someone explain how to access the server from the application in BTP ?

org.springframework.web.client.ResourceAccessException: I/O error on POST request for \"http://localhost:8086/v2/configurations\": Connection refused

Caused by: java.net.ConnectException: Connection refused","\tat java.base/sun.nio.ch.Net.connect0(Native Method)","\tat java.base/sun.nio.ch.Net.connect(Unknown Source)"

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Hi @DumaK, please reach out to support to look into your case and help you.

Kind Regards, Suzanne

entry.title: Re: Mapping of SAML attributes with XSUAA JWT in Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hi Prashant,

Aparently the Application attributes defined in IAS for Workzone overwrites the attributes defined in IAS for XSUAA .

Adding them to the Application attributes it works!

Thank you very much!

entry.title: unable to enter net price value 9,615,000.00
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

We have a requirement for Import PO we need decimal places upto 4 in ouput PO form so is the reason our technical team have written the logic with length 10 with dec places 4. 

How can we achieve this 4 decimal places in output form?

Regards

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Free SAP BTP - Free ABAP System instance
entry.content:
There is one drawback: You have to restart the ABAP environment daily from the Landscape Portal, which can take 20-30 minutes depending on your schedule. You have to keep that in mind.

Thanks for the article, very detailed 👍

entry.title: Re: unable to enter net price value 9,615,000.00
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

I understand your need to add a custom field to your form, . Unfortunately, within the standard SAP setup, this isn't possible. Additionally, customizations like this fall outside of SAP's official support.

We’re unable to provide detailed guidance on custom fields, but I would recommend exploring the SAP Community. You might find alternative practices and solutions shared by others who have faced similar challenges.

 

Thanks

SAP SUPPORT

entry.title: SAP Universal ID: 邮箱已绑定情况下需解绑
entry.content:
本博客由我的同事 Vivian Cheng 翻译

遇到无法绑定 SAP Universal ID 情况，并出现以下报错

根据知识库文章 2914815 - 如何从 SAP 通用 ID 中解除用户的绑定或删除 UID - SAP for Me，

客户有两个可选择的操作步骤：

如果您有 S-User，您可以在 SAP For Me 创建案例

  1. 创建案例：

选择组件 XX-SER-UID 创建案例，并提供以下信息：

  • SAP Universal ID 主邮箱：
  • 删除SAP Universal ID：是/否
  • 解绑 (S-user ID, P-user ID)：
  • 移除邮箱：
  • 请求理由：

案例必须由绑定到 SAP Universal ID的 S-user 或SAP Universal ID主邮箱所属的客户编号下的超级，云或用户管理员创建。

如果您没有S-User 或无法在 SAP For Me 上创建案例，可以联系我们的客户互动中心

 

  1. 联系客户互动中心（CIC）：

通过电子邮件将您的请求发送至客户互动中心，并提供以下信息：

  • SAP Universal ID 主邮箱：
  • 删除SAP Universal ID：是/否
  • 解绑 (S-user ID, P-user ID)：
  • 移除邮箱：
  • 请求理由：

 

电子邮件必须从与SAP Universal ID绑定的电子邮箱发送和/或您请求解绑的账户 (S-user ID, P-user ID) 对应的注册邮箱发送。

 

请查看您所在地的客户互动中心电子邮箱：

  • 中国，香港，印度尼西亚，马来西亚，巴基斯坦，菲律宾，台湾，泰国，韩国，新加坡和越南：support.asia@sap.com
  • 澳大利亚和新西兰：support.australia@sap.com
  • 奥地利，比利时，捷克共和国，丹麦，芬兰，法国，德国，希腊，匈牙利，爱尔兰，以色列，意大利，卢森堡，荷兰，挪威，波兰，葡萄牙，巴基斯坦，斯洛伐克，南非，西班牙，瑞典，瑞士和英国：support.emea@sap.com
  • 印度：support.india@sap.com
  • 日本：support.japan@sap.com
  • 安第斯，墨西哥，巴西和南部地区：support.latinamerica@sap.com
  • 卡塔尔，科威特，阿联酋，阿曼，约旦，巴林，埃及，沙特阿拉伯，也门，叙利亚，利比亚，黎巴嫩，巴勒斯坦，伊拉克和苏丹：support.mena@sap.com
  • 美国和加拿大：support.usca@sap.com / support.emea@sap.com

 

学习和认证

可通过创建案例联系Learning team，具体操作步骤请参阅如何联系 SAP 教育 - 学习中心团队以获取支持

 

如果您已在 SAP 学习中心完成培训，您可能已收到带有学习证书的徽章。

 

支持团队会检查 SAP Universal ID，确认学习认证是否已分配给您的 SAP Universal ID 账户。

 

如果学习认证已分配：在学习认证成功转移到其他账户前不支持删除SAP Universal ID（参阅 KBA 2547250 和 2764910）

 

如果学习认证未分配：所有信息都核对无误的情况下将删除SAP Universal ID

 

无论学习认证是否已分配，仅解绑 S或 P用户不会影响分配给特定用户或SAP Universal ID的学习认证。

 

在请求删除SAP Universal ID前，请确保查看 KBA 3383999 了解合规的删除理由。

SAP Universal ID一旦由相关团队删除，将是永久性的，不可逆操作。请注意，删除 SAP Universal ID也会影响您的 SAP Community账号。删除SAP Universal ID将同时删除您的 SAP Community账号。

 

您也可以通过 SAP Universal ID Account Manager请求删除SAP Universal ID。需点击屏幕左侧的 “隐私”，然后点击“请求账户删除”（参阅 https://account.sap.com/manage/privacy）

 

谢谢参阅！

我们希望这些信息对您有帮助。请注意，客户互动中心随时乐意为您提供上述流程的指导。

我们期待听到您的反馈意见，让我们了解您的想法。

 

相关文章

29https://community.sap.com/t5/blogs-about-sap-websites/sap-uids-zusammenf%C3%BChren/ba-p/1395979048...- 常见问题解答 - SAP Universal User ID (SAP UID)

SAP Universal ID information 页面

相关博客德文版 - https://community.sap.com/t5/blogs-about-sap-websites/sap-universal-id-aufheben-der-verkn%C3%BCpfung...

entry.title: AuthenticationType is "BasicAuthentication", but "username" and / or "password" are missing
entry.content:
Good morning everyone,

I’m facing an issue with my SAP BTP destination configuration and would appreciate your guidance.

**Current Setup:**

I have an HTTP destination configured in BTP with Basic Authentication (username/password).

The destination is used by a CAP (Node.js) service to connect to an on-premise OData service via Cloud Connector (ProxyType: OnPremise).

The destination works manually when I use my default-env json in BAS.

**The Problem is:**

When my CAP service calls the destination, I get this error:

_Error during request to remote service: Failed to build headers. Caused by: AuthenticationType is "BasicAuthentication", but "username" and/or "password" are missing!_

My senior advised not to hardcode credentials in the mta.yaml or package.json, but the service fails to retrieve them dynamically.

**So,**

How can I ensure my CAP service retrieves the username/password from the BTP destination?
Are there specific @SAP/cds or @SAP-cloud-sdk configurations required to resolve this?

**Destination Configuration:**

Type: HTTP
Authentication: BasicAuthentication

**CAP Service Code:**
```javascript
const BackendSrv = await cds.connect.to("my destination", { csrf: true });
const orders = await BackendSrv.run(
SELECT.one("OrderByIds", orderId)
);
```

**package.json:**
```json
"cds": {
"requires": {
"placeholdername": {
"kind": "odata-v2",
"csrf": true,
"model": "srv/external/placeholdername",
"credentials": {
"destination": "my destination name"
}
}
},
"[production]": {
"requires": {
"db": {
"kind": "hana-cloud"
},
"placeholdername": {
"kind": "odata-v2",
"model": "srv/external/placeholdername",
"csrf": true,
"csrfInBatch": true,
"credentials": {
"destination": "my destination name"
}
},
"connectivity": true,
"destination": true,
"auth": {
"kind": "xsuaa"
}
},
"log": {
"levels": {
"ui-service": "trace"
}
}
}
}
```

**mta.yaml:**
```yaml
_schema-version: 3.3.0
ID: myapp
version: 1.0.0
description: "A simple CAP project."
parameters:
enable-parallel-deployments: true
build-parameters:
before-all:
- builder: custom
commands:
- npm ci
- npx cds build --production
modules:
- name: myapp-srv
type: nodejs
path: gen/srv
parameters:
instances: 1
buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
build-parameters:
builder: npm-ci
provides:
- name: srv-api
properties:
srv-url: ${default-url}
requires:
- name: myapp-auth
- name: myapp-destination
- name: myapp-db
- name: myapp-connectivity
- name: myapp
type: approuter.nodejs
path: app/
parameters:
keep-existing-routes: true
disk-quota: 256M
memory: 256M
requires:
- name: srv-api
group: destinations
properties:
name: srv-api
url: ~{srv-url}
forwardAuthToken: true
- name: myapp-auth
- name: myapp-destination
provides:
- name: app-api
properties:
app-protocol: ${protocol}
app-uri: ${default-uri}
- name: myapp-db-deployer
type: hdb
path: gen/db
parameters:
buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
requires:
- name: myapp-db
resources:
- name: myapp-auth
type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
parameters:
service: xsuaa
service-plan: application
path: ./xs-security.json
config:
xsappname: myapp-${org}-${space}
tenant-mode: dedicated
- name: myapp-destination
type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
parameters:
service: destination
service-plan: lite
- name: myapp-db
type: com.sap.xs.hdi-container
parameters:
service: hana
service-plan: hdi-shared
- name: myapp-connectivity
type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
parameters:
service: connectivity
service-plan: lite
```

I’ve verified the destination name matches in package.json and that the Cloud Connector is reachable. Any insights would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: How to setup for joule in SAP BTP- BAS
entry.content:
Thanks for the update! Since you have an S-user ID and access to SAP Build, that’s a great start — but to use Joule Chat inside Eclipse ADT, you’ll also need a Connected ABAP System That Supports Joule

Joule Chat in Eclipse doesn't run on its own — it becomes available only when you're connected to a backend ABAP system (like S/4HANA Cloud or BTP ABAP Environment) that supports Joule.

So, please confirm do you have this available with you or not. Based on this response i can suggest you further.

Otherwise, I can suggest two options:

Option 1 – If You Have Access to SAP BTP ABAP Environment (Steampunk)

  1. Log into your SAP BTP cockpit

  2. Check if there's a subaccount with ABAP environment enabled

  3. If yes, connect it in Eclipse:

    • File > New > ABAP Cloud Project

    • Log in with your S-user

    • Select the ABAP instance

  4. Once connected, try:

    • Window > Show View > Joule > Joule Chat

 

Option 2 – If You Don't Have an ABAP System Yet

You can request access to a trial ABAP Environment:

  • Go to https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/abap.html

  • Scroll to the Free Trial section

  • Set up your BTP trial account and create an ABAP instance

After this, you’ll be able to connect from Eclipse and Joule Chat should be available (if enabled in your region/account).

entry.title: ADT Keyword Highlights Are Broken
entry.content:
Hi all,

in ADT, Eclipse, it seems the syntax highlighting is really quite broken. See the following screenshots.

Before placing the cursor in the class-syntax-group:

After placing the cursor in the class-syntax-group:

Notice the color change of the keyword "DEFINTION".

This also happens with other keywords. But this only appears, when the keyword "DEFINTION" is in the same line with the keyword "CLASS". If it is in the next line, the issue does not appear.

Also when using only "*" as a keyword for syntax highlighting, each rune gets colored, eventhough it is not a keyword (such as brackets etc.)

Is there a fix for this?

entry.title: Re: inquiry about adding a desired format to the UI templ...
entry.content:
Hello,

 

You can use this option to edit the screen:

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Invoke Generative AI Hub Models using @sap-ai-sdk/ai-...
entry.content:
Hi,

The AI SDK automatically reads the AI Core service credentials from the VCAP_SERVICES variable in Cloud Foundry. It also takes care of fetching the necessary access tokens. If you want to test your app locally, you can create a .env file at the root level in your project and add the credentials as shown here. (Note: This is however not recommended for productive use cases).

entry.title: Re: ZUGFeRD import to SAP Business One
entry.content: Hello, please post a screenshot of the screen where you make the mentioned step: "I have added the XPaths and Namespaces".

entry.title: Re: Generate CAP Project in BAS with Error @sap/hdi-deplo...
Re: inquiry about adding a desired format to the UI templ...
entry.content: a journal voucher and a journal voucher entry are different. I need the entry format.

entry.title: Re: Generate CAP Project in BAS with Error @sap/hdi-deplo...
entry.content: We found a fix: in the file mta.yaml, in the section build-parameters: before-all: - builder: custom commands: - npx -p @SAP/cds-dk@8.8.2 cds build --production add '@8.8.2' right after '@sap/cds-dk'

entry.title: Re: Withholding Tax on USA/Puerto RIco localization
entry.content:
Hi @Félix_Toribio ,

There is nothing in the SAP documentation (U.S and Puerto Rico) regarding withholding tax, so saying it is not applicable to this localisation may be a correct assumption.

Additionally, withholding tax generally does not apply to commercial transactions between businesses in the U.S. I think it might be applicable to wages, interest and other financial transactions, and these wouldn't have a specific routine in SAP B1 to get posted with such details.

I hope it helps.

Best regards,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: Log changes in Qunats
entry.content:
Hello @marcel_d 

As far as I know LE-WM quants are modified with the L_LQUA_VERAENDERN function. You could put your custom logging logic there.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Enabling Generative AI in SAP BTP: Integrating AI Core, AI Launchpad, and API Readiness
entry.content:
@JulianMessall Currently, SAP AI Core does not offer fine-grained access control at the service key or instance level, meaning that anyone with AI Core extended credentials (service key) can potentially have full administrative access via the API. AI Launchpad, on the other hand, provides Role Collections for UI-based access control.

To mitigate risk, service bindings can be used in SAP BTP to improve security and governance when accessing SAP AI Core instead of exposing raw service keys.

Bind the AI Core instance to your application,The application will receive AI Core credentials via the VCAP_SERVICES environment variable. Retrieve the credentials in your application code.

Service bindings are great for app-to-service communication but:

  • They don't control API access for developers working with AI Core manually.
  • If direct API calls are needed from local scripts, service keys may still be required.
  • Role-based governance (in AI Launchpad) should still be used alongside bindings.

So to sum it up:

  • Use service bindings for applications
  • Use AI Launchpad roles for human access
  • Restrict service key exposure

Best Regards, Dima

entry.title: Re: Enabling Generative AI in SAP BTP: Integrating AI Core, AI Launchpad, and API Readiness
entry.content:
@JulianMessall Currently, SAP AI Core does not offer fine-grained access control at the service key or instance level, meaning that anyone with AI Core extended credentials (service key) can potentially have full administrative access via the API. AI Launchpad, on the other hand, provides Role Collections for UI-based access control.

To mitigate risk, service bindings can be used in SAP BTP to improve security and governance when accessing SAP AI Core instead of exposing raw service keys.

Bind the AI Core instance to your application,The application will receive AI Core credentials via the VCAP_SERVICES environment variable. Retrieve the credentials in your application code.

Service bindings are great for app-to-service communication but:

  • They don't control API access for developers working with AI Core manually.
  • If direct API calls are needed from local scripts, service keys may still be required.
  • Role-based governance (in AI Launchpad) should still be used alongside bindings.

So to sum it up:

  • Use service bindings for applications
  • Use AI Launchpad roles for human access
  • Restrict service key exposure

Best Regards, Dima

entry.title: Re: Generate unique email adresses during the hire process
entry.content: Hi if the First name is Tom Lin and Last name is Chris, is it expected to create email as tom.lin.chris@companyname.com?

entry.title: Re: Error message while confirming a repair order in SAP...
entry.content:
Hello,

The error comes likely from master data. You can try the following:

  1. Verify Personnel Records: Ensure that the personnel master records are correctly set up in the system. The message indicates that there is no personnel number associated with the record transferred, which suggests a missing or incorrect personnel data configuration.

  2. Check User Authorization: Sometimes, missing personnel numbers could be related to insufficient authorization for accessing personnel data. Verify that the necessary roles and permissions are properly assigned to the user trying to confirm the order.

  3. Create Personnel Records: If the personnel record is truly missing, you might need to create or update personnel master records in your SAP system to associate a personnel number with the repair order.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Post import RFC connection FINBTR@SIDCLNT100 does not point to local system SID but to empty system
entry.content:
During the import of a transport request containing R3TR TDAT FINB_TR_DERIVATION, there is an error with the below messages in the log, especially the message FINB_TR081 is an error:

Post-import method FINB_TR_AFTER_IMP_METHOD started for FINB_TR_DERIVATION T, date and time: 20250328170804 (PU122)

Post-processing taking place in client 100 (PU186)

RFC connection FINBTR@SIDCLNT100 does not point to local system SID but to (FINB_TR081)

No suitable RFC destination could be found (FINB_TR032)

Errors occurred during post-handling FINB_TR_AFTER_IMP_METHOD for FINB_TR_DERIVATION T (PU133)

 

Why is there no system indicated after "but to"? How to solve?

entry.title: Re: ATP & MRP Areas
entry.content: Thank you both for the feedback @DominikTylczyn @Andreas_Krause , i have configured ABC and function still not working in sales order availability check , my question now is i activate ABC in availability checking group x and i assign material type in this availability checking in plant level , and i assign availability check x in material master is there is difference between availability check in material master and availability checking group or how the system determine this availability checking group in sales order to run ABC during ATP check

entry.title: Re: How to connect and test CAP application locally with...
entry.content:
Hi,
Are you developing in SAP Business Application Studio? If so, you can use the "Run Configuration" tool for this purpose, available from the "Full-Stack Application using Productivity Tools" dev space.

See more information here: https://help.sap.com/docs/bas/developing-business-applications-using-productivity-tools/testing-applications

Thanks,

Rotem

entry.title: Re: Post import RFC connection FINBTR@SIDCLNT100 does not...
entry.content:
The RFC destination FINBTR@SIDCLNT100 in SM59 is invalid: either it points to an invalid system, or the user is blocked or has an invalid password.

Technical reason: the function module FINB_TR_AFTER_IMP_METHOD (defined as post import function module of object FINB_TR_DERIVATION in transaction SOBJ) is called when R3TR TDAT FINB_TR_DERIVATION is imported, it calls FINB_TR_GET_RFC_DEST, which calls the subroutine DESTINATION_CHECK, which checks that the RFC destination is valid but doesn't check if it fails for which reason it fails and always send the error message FINB_TR081:

    CALL FUNCTION 'RFC_GET_SYSTEM_INFO'
      EXPORTING
        destination  = l_dest_str
      IMPORTING
        rfcsi_export = l_rfcsi.
    IF l_rfcsi-rfcsysid <> sy-sysid.
*     raise an exception because rfc-dest was found but customized wrongly
      MESSAGE e081 WITH i_rfcdest sy-sysid l_rfcsi-rfcsysid RAISING not_found.
*   RFC-Verbindung &1 zeigt nicht auf das lokale System &2
    ENDIF.

I would expect that after the function module call, if L_RFCSI is initial it fails with the error message coming either from the parameter DEST_SYSTEM_MESSAGE (e.g. "Name or password is incorrect (repeat logon)") or from the parameter DEST_COMMUNICATION_MESSAGE (e.g. "RFC destination XXXXXXX does not exist.") 

NB: how to create the RFC destination FINBTR@SIDCLNT100 is explained either in the note 644610:

  • c) Preliminary remarks on the RFC connection in the import postprocessing
  • An RFC destination is required for the import postprocessing in the target clients of the transport. Create an RFC connection for this using Transaction SM59 of the category '3' (R/3 connection). For security reasons, the user of the RFC connection should be a communication user with sufficient authorizations. The client must be explicitly entered in the destination, the logon language should not be entered. Implement this RFC destination in Transaction FINB_TR_DEST (under FINBASIS 1.0B Transaction SM30 with view FINB_TR_DESTV) and check the effectiveness of the RFC connection.

Or in SPRO (go there directly by using SM30 > View FINB_TR_DESTV > Button "Customizing"). NB: the RFC destination wizard is the transaction code FINB_TR_WZ:

Excerpt from the Wizard documentation in SPRO: "Examples: 1. You want to transport Customizing settings to client 100 of the current system. Start the wizard and enter 100 as the client. 2. You want to make a client copy from client 000. Start the wizard and enter 000 as the client."

entry.title: Re: Determine Partner from one Bill To party to Multiple...
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP Settlement Management, a condition contract combines all information relevant to an agreement Internal Commissions Settlement - Condition Contract for conditions requiring subsequent settlement, such as rebate or accrual conditions, settlement calendars, and business volume criteria.

Scenario

You have a situation where one Bill-To party is linked to multiple Sold-To parties. During the settlement process within condition contracts, it is essential to determine the correct Sold-To party associated with the business volume, and accordingly, settle the price from the condition records to the customer.

Steps to Achieve this:

  1. Business Volume Selection Criteria:

    • The condition contract type defines the data source for settlement, which could include billing documents for sales rebate condition contracts. You need to specify customers, products, or order reasons to define which Sold-To parties are considered for the business volume calculation.

  2. Condition Records and Settlement Documents:

    • Condition records include detailed pricing procedures, which determine the rebate or accrual amounts during settlement runs. Ensure that condition records for each Sold-To party are accurately maintained.
    • As settlement documents are created according to the settings of the condition contract type, they link to financial accounting through journal entries that reflect the rebate or accrual amounts.

  3. Calculation and Posting:

    • The settlement document calculation process uses the pricing procedures specified in the condition contract, considering the business volume captured from the correct Sold-To party.

Tools and Apps

  • Manage Condition Contracts: Use this app to create and modify condition contracts and ensure that all relevant business volume criteria are specified.

  • Settle Condition Contracts: This app assists in generating the actual settlement documents based on the business volume and condition records.

Implementing these steps ensures that rebates and settlements are accurately calculated and posted to the appropriate Sold-To Purchasing Rebate Management - Settlement Document parties, maintaining correct financial records and facilitating ease of reconciliation.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Empty profit center from billing documents gets overwritten in CCM
entry.content:
Hello, 

we are facing the following issue at the customer:

the profit center is defined as a split criterium in CCM and for some billing documents the profit center is empty . As the profit center is a split criterium, we expect that also on the relevant settlement document item the profit center will be empty during the Delta accrual. However it gets automatically overwritten by the profit center of the mat/plant combination (visible in WBRP, WCOCOF) This is causing issues during the matching when the final settlement is done because on the business volume there is no profit center available (as it is empty on the billing docs). No transfer events are defined which fill the profit center in the system.

Any advice? Is it standard SAP behaviour that the profit center gets filled in on the settlement document? This request is a bit the opposite of the issue in this blog Profit center in settlement document in CCM - SAP Community

I already tried to add a ' ' profit center in the transfer event 65 but it did not change the result. Please also see the attachement.

Many thanks ,

Ilse

entry.title: Re: Email Template - TotalGrossAmount value NOT in availa...
entry.content:
Hello,

To add the TotalGrossAmount as a variable in your email template when sending a billing document by email to your customer, follow these steps:

  1. Access the ‘Maintain Email Templates’ App: Open the ‘Maintain Email Templates’ app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. This app lists all the pre-delivered and custom templates, allowing you to customize them.

  2. Select the Appropriate Template: Navigate to your pre-existing email template used for sending billing documents.

  3. Add Custom Business Context: Unfortunately, the TotalGrossAmount field may not be included in the standard set of available fields for email templates. Thus, you need to enable this by creating a custom business context or extending the current one.

  4. Access the ‘Show Data Fields’ Feature: Within the email template editor, utilize the ‘Show Data Fields’ feature to search for available fields.

  5. Add Custom Code for TotalGrossAmount: If the field is not listed, custom development or enhancement might be needed to include TotalGrossAmount from the backend.

  6. Sync or Deploy Changes: After incorporating changes or custom development to include TotalGrossAmount, ensure these changes are moved to the production environment.

By following these steps, you should be able to integrate the TotalGrossAmount into your email template, allowing it to be used just like other fields such as TotalNetAmount and TotalTaxAmount.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: SAP Focused Run Upgrade to 5.0
entry.content:
Introduction

This is my first blog, so please bear with me if there are any mistakes, and I’d appreciate any suggestions for future posts!
I noticed there is less documentation regarding Focused Run, so I decided to write about it.
Recently, I carried out an upgrade of Focused Run from version 4.0 SP00 to 5.0 SP00. In this post, I’ll walk you through the steps I followed during the upgrade process.


Overview
SAP have recently released Focused Run 5.0 Patch in February 2025. Please check below here.
For each Focused RUN release there is a standard note . For Focused RUN 5.0 kindly check 3529562 - Release Information Note for SAP Focused Run 5.0 SP00 and steps can be documented in the runbook.

Also check this nice blog .All the steps given below are checked thoroughly in notes, master and security guides and most of them are mandatory.
Follow whatever is applicable in your scenario.

Preparation
Below are the preparation steps:-1.Implement note before upgrade (3480900 - Corrections to improve the performance for PI Messages) and note the transport number.
2.Verify if HANA DB Version is 2.0 on 079.01 or higher revision (>=2.00.079.01) on Focused Run system
3.Verify if kernel release 7.93 64-BIT UNICODE PL 101 or higher on Focused Run system
4.Verify if SAP Host agent Version 7.22 PL 65 or higher in all Managed systems
5.Verify for ST - PI and ST-A/PI version updated to latest versions as per RTCCTOOLS report
6.Verify if OS Version is SLES15/X86_64 64BIT
7.Verify if Software Update Manager (SUM) Version is be 2.0 SP21 PL5 and higher
8.Update latest SPAM/SAINT (minimum version SP089)
9.Validate CA APM version to be 10.8
10.Check for missing indexes and correct if any in Focused Run system
11.Validate for Filesystem free space for SUM
12.Generate stack.xml as per components in note (3529562)
13.Take screenshots of scope selection from used use cases tiles
14.Take screenshots of Data Center and network configurations for all customers
15.Take screenshots job server group , RFC server group and SMLG
16.Export the roles of all users
17.Export SSI data locally
18.Export Agent Admin data (Host wise and SID'S wise)
19.Export Active monitoring templates
20.Extract the FRUN Job list
21.Exports of CSA Policy and CSA administration Data
22.Export LMDB list for all customer ( by hosts wise and SID'S)
23.Export List of systems in EWA for all customer
24.Export List of systems in SAM for all customer
25.Export List of systems from workmode tile
26.Take LMDB Cross associations screenshots from LMDB Tools
27.Export system monitoring data for all customer
28.Validate and delete QCM * tables if any


Execution

1.Run the SUM tool for upgrade
2.Checkpoint for completion of Preprocessing
3.Backup Focused Run System and SUM Directory
4.Deactivate the SMTP Node to disable alerting from Focused Run
5.Lock all users except administrator user ids
6.Stop all jobs using BTCTRANS1
7.Check if two jobs are de -scheduled SAP_LMDB_NOTIFY_DISPATCHER and SAP_LMDB_NTFC_PACEMAKER
8.Proceed with Downtime Execution


Post Steps

1.Perform Postprocessing steps in SUM
2.End of Upgrade in SUM
3.Re-start the SAP application and Perform component validation with note (3529562)
4.Check SAP_ UI5 version (Install latest SAPUI5 patch for version 1.120. The procedure is described in SAP Note 3155948 - ABAP SAPUI5 patch version update.)
5.Two new RFC Groups have to added in R212 FRN_RFC_HM and FRN_RFC_AEM
6.SAP System validation and sanity checks and SGEN
7.Implement the post processing notes and save the changes in transport note the transport number

3529381 Composite Note for UI5 applications in Focused Run Release 5.0 SP00
Infrastructure Administration 3529410 Composite Note for Infrastructure Administration in Focused Run 5.0 SP00
Integration & User Monitoring 3529338 Composite Note for Integration and User Monitoring in SAP Focused Run 5.0 SP00
Application & System Monitoring 3529390 Composite Note for Application and System Monitoring in SAP Focused Run 5.0 SP00
Alert & Notification Management 3529364 Composite Note for Alert and Notification Monitoring in SAP Focused Run 5.0 SP00
Analytics & Intelligence 3529339 Composite Note for Analytics and Intelligence in SAP Focused Run 5.0 SP00
Root Cause Analysis 3529336 Composite Note for Root Cause Analysis in SAP Focused Run 5.0 SP00
Operations Automation 3529366 Composite Note for Operations Automation in SAP Focused Run 5.0 SP00
Maintenance & Service 3529298 Composite Note for Maintenance and Service in SAP Focused Run 5.0 SP00
Service Level Management 3529400 Composite Note for Service Level Management in SAP Focused Run 5.0 SP00

8.Invalidate the global UI2 caches to cleanup the Fiori Startpage
[Invalidate the global UI2 caches to cleanup the Fiori Startpage by executing transaction /n/ui2/inval_caches.
Recalculate the application indexes as recommended in note 2449635: Execute report /UI5/APP_INDEX_CALCULATE -> Full Calculation (commit the warning with 'Enter').In case of display issues in Fiori Launchpad a browser cache reset should be performed on client side.]
9.Execute report: RLMDB_NTFC_CREATE_EVENTS_JOBS and validate the jobs SAP_LMDB_NOTIFY_DISPATCHER and SAP_LMDB_NTFC_PACEMAKER are re-scheduled again.
10.Rescheduled all jobs after the update with report BTCTRNS2
11.Check if all MAI_JOBS released and working fine
12.Re-execute report COF_SETUP to reinitialize the collector framework
Perform Task list Activation
[SAP_GW_FIORI_ERP_ONE_CLNT_SETUP without variant
SAP_FRUN_SETUP_USECASE with variant SAP&FRUN_INIT
SAP_FRUN_SETUP_FOUNDATION with variant SAP&FRUN. All checkboxes should be activated (new technical users will be created, roles for existing users are updated, batch jobs are scheduled or adapted).
SAP_FRUN_SETUP_USECASE with all available variants (at least the variants for the active use cases) and all checkboxes selected.]
Validate LMDB_SETUP (SAP CR AND SAP CIM update )
13.Upgrade SDA from agent admin for all hosts to 1.65 and SAPMACHINE21
14.Content Update (3475561 - Manual content update of FRUN-CONT 500 in SAP Focused Run.)
15.Regenerate profiles using "PFCG → Utilities → Mass Generation and → Mass Comparison for roles SAP_FRN* in central SAP
Focused Run."

Testing and Validations

1.Engine Performance Test->Check in Self-Mon the engine runtime check the job SAP_ALERT_CALCULATION_ENGINE and its runtime should be below 1 min
2.UI Performance Test
3.Do re-execution of SSI for all systems
4.Agent Administration - validate all agents are green
5.System Monitoring - validate the system monitoring for all SID and customers
6.Template Checks using Template Compare Tool (new/changed metrics)
7.Validate the Template Assignments for all the systems
8.Validate the Alert Inbox
9.Check Focused Run and standard job validation
10.Validate EWA Report Generation
11.Validate the LMDB Datacenter Information
12.Validate all dashboards
13.Resume Alerts from SMTP and check if alerts are started


Conclusion

Follow all the standard notes for upgrade and list out steps according to your scenario.

Hope this information helps you and you perform Focused Run upgrade successfully without any issues.

Thank you
Shailesh Patil

entry.title: Adjusting Column Width in Table for Smartform in SAP FSM Mobile App
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

We have added a table with a single column in a Smartform, allowing technicians to add multiple rows. However, we are facing an issue where the column width is fixed and cannot be adjusted, even though there is enough space available in the SAP FSM Mobile App.

Questions:

  1. Is there a way to adjust or increase the column width in Smartforms?

  2. If not, is there any workaround to improve the readability of table entries?

We appreciate any insights or recommendations on this issue.

Filip

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud

entry.title: BDLS Conversion required in other productive systems like BW post S/4HANA Migration from ECC?
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Is BDLS conversion required for the non-migrated productive systems in the landscape, after primary ECC system has been migrated to S/4HANA 2023 system (On-Prem) with change in SID [BDLS is of course, run here in this S4HANA system]?

For example, ECC has interconnected BW, GTS and EWM systems. Once ECC moves to S/4HANA, will there be a need to run BDLS in these BW, GTS and EWM production systems? Or just defining the new logical system name (BD54) enough?

Thanks,

Shouvik

entry.content:
Hello Nicolas,

1. great suggestion, thank you.

2. Could you please elaborate on your idea?

Filip

entry.title: Sales Return Copy Data
entry.content: i want to copy all billing document data to return sales order when it is punched with reference to billing document except for two particular division out of 22 divisions, apart from enhancement what else can be done?

entry.title: Re: Could you please tell me how to register an order sli...
entry.content:
Hello,

To register an order slip and process it afterwards for direct shipping to the supplier, you can follow these guidelines using SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Relevant Scope Items

For direct shipping to the supplier during ordering, the following SAP S/4HANA scope items are applicable:

1. BD3 - Third-Party Sales Process with Notifications

  • Process Overview: This scope item supports the sales process where customer orders are forwarded to third-party vendors. It involves automatic creation of purchase requisitions for materials to be delivered directly to the end customers by third-party suppliers. The third-party vendors ship goods directly to your customers and invoice them directly.

2. BDK - Third-Party Sales Process without Notifications

  • Process Overview: Similar to BD3, this scope item enables direct ordering of goods from third-party suppliers without shipping notifications. Upon receipt of an invoice from the supplier, the billing amount is updated automatically.

Process Steps

Registration of Order Slip

  1. Create Sales Order: Use the solution order management app to create a sales order. Choose BD3 or BDK scope item depending Solution Order Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2111 on whether shipping notifications are required.

  2. Automatic Purchase Requisition: Upon creating the sales order, a purchase requisition is automatically generated for the required materials.

Processing After Order

  1. Convert to Purchase Order: Convert the purchase requisition into a purchase order for the supplier.

  2. Monitor Shipping and Billing: If using BD3, follow the shipping process; for BDK, monitor the billing amount updates as invoices arrive.

  3. Complete Transaction: Complete the sales billing process as per the updated amounts.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: Subject: How to Register Memo-like Items in Sales BOM...
entry.content:
Hello,

To register memo-like text items in sales BOMs that are not related to inventory or pricing, using the ‘Text Item (T)’ category is typically the approach taken. However, as you mentioned, these items may not appear in sales orders when configured this way.

Solution

  1. Use BOM with Item Category Group ERLA:

    • When processing BOMs on the main item level with item category group ERLA, the components serve as text items. Sales - Bills of Material in Sales Documents This ensures that they are included for information purposes without impacting inventory management or pricing.

  2. Configuration Settings:

    • Ensure that the Sales BOM is correctly set up with BOM Usage: 5 and item category group ERLA for the main item.
    • The subitems will be managed as text items, provided that the configuration supports this, although you may need to verify that this setting aligns with the version you are using.

  3. Review SAP Documentation or Notes:

    • Sometimes limitations exist in how BOM items function within the system, especially concerning text-based components. SAP documentation or support notes related to Sales BOM configurations could provide additional insights or alternative approaches to handle these cases.

By leveraging the main item level processing with item category ERLA, it’s possible to incorporate components as text items effectively. If issues persist, consulting specific SAP notes or configurations related to version 2 updates may be beneficial.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

My name is Ayesha Mirza from India. I am an MBA Finance student and passionate about mastering SAP

entry.title: How to Add custom field in XK01/XK02/XK03 in Purchasing view tab
entry.content:
Hi SAP'ns,

I have requirement to add custom field in XK01/XK02/XK03 screen under purchasing view tab. 

No need to click any push button it should display in SAP screen like below picture..

Pls guide me to achieve this.

entry.title: Re: Automatic sending of SalesOrder messages from the S/4...
entry.content:
Hello,

To ensure sales orders in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud are automatically sent to the sales order queue Event Driven Integration with SAP S/4 HANA Cloud u… - SAP Community in SAP Event Mesh, you need to complete the following steps:

1. Configure the Enterprise Event Enablement

  • Navigate to the Enterprise Event Enablement application in your S/4HANA Cloud system.
  • Ensure your user has the necessary permissions, specifically the role SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR.

2. Activate the Outbound Event

  • Add the sales order change event as an outbound event in the Enterprise Event Enablement S/4HANA Cloud Events and SAP BTP Kyma - SAP Community app.
  • The topic should be configured as sap/s4/beh/salesorder/created/v1.

3. Verify Communication Arrangement

  • Check that the communication arrangement for eventing is correctly set up using the scenario SAP_COM_0092, if applicable.
  • Ensure it lists the event mesh as a client for outbound topics.

4. Set Up Event Mesh Queue

  • Within the SAP Event Mesh, ensure the queue salesOrderChangedQueue subscribes to the event sap/s4/beh/salesorder/created/v1.
  • Make sure the queue is correctly configured to handle incoming sales order events.

5. Configure Webhook (Optional)

  • If using a webhook in SAP Event Mesh, ensure proper settings including OAuth2.0 client credentials for security.

6. Integration Suite Configuration

  • Set up the AMQP adapter in your SAP Cloud Integration to retrieve messages from the sales order queue.
  • Ensure that the configuration allows for handling the data content type and formatting (e.g., JSON to XML) for subsequent OData calls.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: LMS purge users from success factors and external users
entry.content:
Hello,
We have a scenario involving purging users coming from SuccessFactors and users registered on learning sites.
We are trying to understand how this scenario should work. I have been reading the documentation, and as far as I understand, for users from SuccessFactors, the purge should be done in the BizX system using the option DRTM Learning Data Purge. For external users, the documents I read seemed to show how to perform this only for native users (i.e., users without EC). They also mention that the termination date is considered for internal users, which makes it confusing. Will the job purge internal users based on the termination date as well?

Does anyone have documentation about these scenarios or experience with this process and could share how it was handled?

Thanks,
Ana

entry.title: Re: Business Data Validation of Custom Reports using Data Transition Validation (DTV) tool
entry.content:
Hi Varun,

At this moment DTV has this limitation, where the user who has added the custom report/reports in the test specification can only execute the reports in both ECC and S/4HANA system.

You are right this limitation is not applicable for SAP standard reports.

Thanks, and Regards

Abhya

entry.title: Re: OpenID for S/4HANA On-Prem for User Login without usi...
entry.content: We are facing issue during the redirect URL as i have mentioned as /sap/public/bc/sec/oidc/redirect but when authentication we are getting error "OpenID Connect (OIDC) Authentication Error Error Details: An error occurred when processing the Authentication Response from the OpenID Provider. Please contact your System Administrator."

entry.title: Re: Email Template - TotalGrossAmount value NOT in availa...
entry.content: Hello Dequan Xu, thank you for your answer. You're right, the TotalGrossAmount is not in the fields available. Therefore, as you're mentioning it, what are the steps to be executed to create a custom business context or extend the current one in order to have the field available in the tempate ? Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to Send Invoice status update for Canceled invoice (MR8M) from S/4 to Ariba Business Network
entry.content:
Hi @PrashantGite ，many thanks for the sharing, it is very insightful.

Regarding the "Logic to find the reversed/cancelled invoice", would you mind to provide some code snippet, I tried to look up table RBKP but cannot find the field "Reversed by".

Best regards,

Sirui

entry.title: There is an API for calling GETPDF for a billing Document but it only fetches latest PDF
entry.content:
Hi all, 

There is an API for calling GETPDF for a billing Document but it only fetches latest PDF whose status has been completed. Is there any way or Filter to fetch the Desired Template by filtering it in S4hana Public cloud.

/sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV/GetPDF  

API fo that

entry.title: Re: ATP & MRP Areas
entry.content: You can activate ABC via customizing, see https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/f132c385e0234fe68ae9ff35b2da178c/645bf9254eaf47bbaf2a4dc27bb7f780.html?locale=en-US .

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One's Integration Hub - Central Blog (updated Dec 21 2020)
entry.content:
Hi, anybody know where I can find last version PL46?

I don't see it in "download center", but according to the Note 3250656, download should be available for "licensed" customers.

entry.title: Re: Manufacturing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content: Can you share link where i can  Process Manufacturing within SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition - Functions with release 2502 and discrte Manufacturing.? A document which is helpful comparing the Private cloud and Public cloud.

entry.title: Re: Defaulting Pick-Up Dates on Freight Units
entry.content:
Hi @SFC 

"Did I misunderstand the use of those fields? Appreciate any pointers to have the dates under Source populated."

For outbound Delivery/ Customer Order/Sales Order - O Means Source means Shipping Point and I means Customer means Destination... Please see example below with data of Freight Unit created from Sales Order, influenced to change date and let us know if any questions.

For inbound delivery, it would be reverse

Details link:

 https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e3dc5400c1cc41d1bc0ae0e7fd9aa5a2/beb00cb0f7ae427a95390679c6c56d41.html

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2486759

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-sap/flexible-pickup-delivery-window-interpretation/ba-p/13496215

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Successfactors benefits reimbursement Entitlement amount
entry.content:
Hi Team,

  In SuccessFactors, for Benefit type Reimbursement, entitlement amount should be maintained but in our case the entitlement amount is based on the claim amount, It is like 40% of claim amount will be reimbursed. Is there a way to maintain entitlement amount in this case and how to achieve this scenario.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: ATP & MRP Areas
entry.content: Hello @Andreas_Krause i activate it but when i check the log i have this message "Sources are not configured for Line Item /000010 Product xxxx "

entry.title: Re: How to create an IM PI document for a SLOC which is t...
entry.content: Hello, Thanks for the input. In the mean time I figured out that I can start a count without a PI document reference in MI09 and there I can enter any new material. Pre-requesite is that the material and batch has to exist on that given SLOC. Thanks again!

entry.title: Link Production Order to SAP CPM Change Request
entry.content:
Hello All, Good day. 

We have a business requirement to enable linking Production Order to a Change Request created in SAP CPM(Commercial Project Management). Necessary configurations have been completed but we are facing issue while assigning "Search Help" for the object type - PRN. 

Code Changes done were similar to how ECN - Change Master object type has been setup in standard. While debugging for the component ECN, the below method is triggered from the class /IAM/CL_INTEGRATION_UTIL and the method SEARCH_OBJECT but We couldn’t implement the same method for the PRN component, as the interface /IAM/IF_QUERY_PRN~FIND_BY_ELEMENTS do not exists.

Has anyone implemented such a scenario in your experience ? If so, we really appreciate your help and comments regarding this. 

SAP Commercial Project Management for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Trial Account Creation and Enabling Integration Suite service(SAP CPI)
entry.content: I added all the admin permissions for my trial account and then I was able to see all the options at Integration Suite.

entry.title: Re: How can I create a new page with the Page Map or Page Editor of Fiori tools?
entry.content: How to add define navigation in their model (aka OData service)?

entry.title: Re: EDI PO to SO questions - How to remove segment E1EDKA...
entry.content: Do I need to do something else to link both materials to have the same numbers? I still am not getting qualifier 002 determined but still 001 although the material number is exactly the same in both systems. As for the LS partner type, in the PO I don't have any partner determined at header level nor assigned any partner schema to the order type. It is just getting determined in the IDOC message as a segment as you can see in the screenshot

entry.title: Re: Mass change of Master Recipe usage in SAP Public Clou...
entry.content:
Hello Tiago,

by using standard functionality you can only "Replace Resource".

If you have more complex requirements, please check the following API:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d35113ee62644d3abee1aaec148291d9/4d9ed891a8c547c493e70dbfdcbea7bb.html?locale=en-US

Please check the "Constraint" section to see the restrictions.
I hope this helps. 
Regards Johannes

entry.title: Sub-consolidation with Minimal Cons Groups
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
We have a scenario where we need to report on sub-consolidations. We have 200+ Cons Units and a statutory and management view and sub-cons within them.
Where there is a parent holding an investment in a sub, I understand we will need to setup a CG.
However, for just intercompany elims - how do we avoid setting up cons groups for each sub-consolidation sub-grouping?
A simple example: In the statutory view there is CU 1-7 where CU 3 is the parent of 4 & 5. Graphical below.

If we want to report on consolidated 3 group - this would mean that we have to setup CG-A: 1-7; CG-B for 3 4 and 5.
If I run on CG1 and select 3,4,5 or a CU hierarchy included 3 4 and 5, in Group Data Analysis, I believe the result will display consolidated including eliminations for any CU in CG1 not just 3,4,5.
Asking since we are working with Group Reporting 2023 OP FP01
GRDC is not available, and the site updated from EC-CS where Cons Group hierarchies are successfully used to meet this requirement.

Multiply this requirement by sub-cons for both statutory and management (with 5 sub-groups) and the result is many Cons Groups to run consolidation and roll forward every year.
How do we avoid creating all this effort for the users?
They will need to run tasks and reconcile data.

Regards,
Eyal

entry.title: Re: Determine Partner from one Bill To party to Multiple...
entry.content: Hi Xu, All the above steps are standard and we have done them. Since one bill to party has two different sold to, system is consider only first sold to and forgetting second sold to. And determining price of first sold to only in the settlement documents.

entry.title: Fiori Elements - Prerequisites SAPUI5 version
entry.content:
Hello,

We would like to use Fiori Elements.

Is there an overview of which Fiori Elements features are available from which SAPUI5 version?

We encountered an issue because we created a Fiori Elements application and when deploying, we found that for example the component sap.fe.core.BaseController is only available from SAPUI5 1.90.0.

entry.title: Candidate id is not passing from RCM to ONB to EC
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are facing an issue with third-party integration, where the Candidate ID is not passing from RCM to ONB to EC as expected.

Configuration Details:

  • In RCM, the Candidate ID field is present under the Candidate Profile Template.

  • In Onboarding, we have configured the Candidate ID field as Custom String 12 and Custom Long.

  • We are using Recruit-to-Hire Data Mapping to transfer this data from RCM to ONB to EC.

Issue:

Despite the configuration, the Candidate ID is not flowing through the system as required.

Requesting your support to investigate and resolve this at the earliest.

Best regards,
Rajesh

entry.title: Universal Display Hierarchy - Display values on all hierarchy nodes/levels
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

we want to use the UDH for combining two charateristics.

Issue we see ist that only values are displayed when the hierarchy is expaned to the second characteristic but no values on the parent nodes/first charateristic when not expanded.

So in the example of 
Screen Area: Universal Display Hierarchy | SAP Help Portal

We want value also at country level -> yellow mark (especially when not expanded to city level).

What kind of setting is needed for that?
In other queries (that use UDH) it is showing values on all UDH levels.

Thanks for all replies in advance!

Best regards

Axel

entry.title: Course is not moving to learning history after completion
entry.content:
Good day,

We have a course currently assigned to over 200 users. All Learning completion settings are setup correctly, however upon completion of the course, the course does not move to learning history. "Add to history on completion of all content" is checked.

entry.title: Re: ATP & MRP Areas
entry.content:
Hello,

I suppose you have activated SBC by mistake. Please deactivate the SBC flag for the checking group:

SPRO

Advanced Available-to-Promise (aATP)
Configuration Activities for Enhanced Check Methods
-> Configure Enhanced Check Methods by Document Purpose

and check again.

--------------

If ABC is not being executed somehow -> please review the checklist of question 1 of KBA 2776851 FAQ: Alternative based Confirmation (ABC) with aATP.

Hope this helps.

best regards,

Michael

entry.title: Re: SAP ENABLE NOW SCORM: COMPLETION STATUS IS NOT UPDATE (LMS: CORNERSTONE)
entry.content: Hi Shane, I am still getting the objects tracked the Book is showing completion in the debug mode but the demo and practice mode even though the tracking is set to false are marked incomplete and the SCO is still showing incomplete

entry.title: Re: EDI PO to SO questions - How to remove segment E1EDKA...
entry.content: Are you sure you entered supplier material number in the PO in field IDNLF? I am sure it should be then populated in E1EDP19 002.

entry.title: Re: Comparing GHG Protocol and ISO 14064-1: How SAP SFM could support both frameworks
entry.content:
@prashantmeshram Thanks! Glad you liked it, hope it’s helpful!

Always open to connect and support wherever I can.

entry.title: Re: With the new Full People Profile have a section like...
entry.content: Thanks Kayla. I reviewed the document and it was helpful, however, I still don't see the username or the userid. Will either of these be available on the new profile?

entry.title: Re: Unable to activate the Goods Receipt Confirmations Co...
entry.content:
Dear @Ashraf-Afzal,

could you please check if you have activated one of the scope items below?

Guided Buying Capability with SAP Ariba Buying (ONV)

Guided Buying Capability with SAP Ariba Buying (2NV)

Guided Buying for Central Procurement with SAP Ariba Buying (3EN)

 

Best regards,

Marius

entry.title: Read archived records from DFKKZP table
entry.content:
Utilities SAP Contract Accounts Receivable and Payable

Hi All,

We have a requirement to read archived entries for payment lots during run time from DFKKZP table and use few table fields for a different process. 

Could you please share, if there is any recommended way to read the archived entries or any SAP standard function module to read archived records from DFKKZP table. 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Saving / opening a model (PDM) takes far too long
entry.content: First of all many thanks for all the input.
